title: Finished base reveal + Sara: phase 1 done
prompt: Wide hero shot on @beach-shore — the completed @sandcastle-research-base in all its glory: enormous multi-turret sandcastle with a moat, decorated with seashells, a small twig-flag at the top with 'RESCUE' written on a tiny paper rectangle. @Sara already standing on the LEFT in front of the castle, hands on her hips, sand on her face, beaming with pride. @Eva already on the RIGHT next to her, doing a tiny victory pose with both arms in the air, sand dusting her curly hair. Sara (chest puffed, grand voice): "Phase ONE — done!" Eva (jumping in place, hands still raised): "Phase TWO — the BOAT!" Sara (matter-of-fact, pointing at the flag): "And we already have the FLAG!"
